title: Evaluate parallel loading speedups
description: Experiment with parallelized discovery/index loading to reduce latency; report before/after benchmark data.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Parallel discovery/index loading implemented in tools/benchmark_discovery.py and rust/src/bin/discovery_benchmark.rs; planning/INDEX_BENCHMARK_PARALLEL.md documents parallel benchmark approach.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: Documented benchmark results comparing baseline vs parallel loading.
